executives.name: Ammar Al-Joundi
executives.background: Mr. Al-Joundi was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Agnico Eagle in February 2022. He previously served as President from 2015 to 2022 and as Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2012 and 2015. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and business strategy in the mining industry.

executives.name: David Garofalo
executives.background: Mr. Garofalo has served as our Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer since August 2020. He has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Previously, he served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Goldcorp Inc. from 2016 to 2019 and as President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc. from 2010 to 2016.

executives.name: Leona Aglukkaq
executives.background: Ms. Aglukkaq is a former Canadian politician who served as a Member of Parliament and held several cabinet positions, including Minister of Health and Minister of the Environment.

executives.name: Louise Grondin
executives.background: Ms. Grondin has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environment and sustainability, notably at Agnico Eagle.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, People and Culture

executives.name: Sean Boyd
executives.background: Mr. Boyd is the Executive Chair of the Board of Agnico Eagle. He served as Chief Executive Officer from 1998 to 2022 and has been with the company since 1985. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: David Garofalo
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Garofalo has served as our Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer since August 2020. He has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Previously, he served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Goldcorp Inc. from 2016 to 2019 and as President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc. from 2010 to 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Jeff Parr
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parr is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has served on the boards of several mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Leona Aglukkaq
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Aglukkaq is a former Canadian politician who served as a Member of Parliament and held several cabinet positions, including Minister of Health and Minister of the Environment.
